name: Rummy
description: Rummy is the foundational card-melding game of the 20th century — draw, group cards into runs and sets, discard, and try to lay everything down before your opponents do. Played with a standard 52-card deck, it spawned dozens of variants (Gin, 500, Indian Rummy, Canasta) that fill kitchen tables and tournament halls alike. Easy rules, deep play.
